scripts.predev: docker compose up -d >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; (lsof -ti tcp:8787; lsof -ti tcp:3400) 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.agent: turbo run build --output-logs=errors-only && pnpm --filter @arzonic/agent-cli run agent
scripts.api: turbo run build --output-logs=errors-only && pnpm --filter @arzonic/agent-api run start
scripts.analyze: turbo run build --filter @arzonic/agent-core --filter @arzonic/agent-shared --output-logs=errors-only && pnpm --filter @arzonic/agent-cli run analyze
